title.zh: 跨 Session Token 拒绝样例

execution.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-binding" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_VICTIM_B2" -H "X-CSRF-Token: CSRF_ATTACKER_TOKEN_B2" --data "marker=CSRF_BINDING_B2" | jq -e '.accepted == false and .reason == "token_session_mismatch"'

description.zh: 组合受害者 Session 与攻击者 Fixture Token，并断言服务端返回绑定不匹配。
description.en: Combine a victim session with an attacker fixture token and assert an explicit binding-mismatch denial.

title.zh: 缺失与空 Token 拒绝矩阵
title.en: Missing and Empty Token Rejection Matrix

execution.command: for mode in missing empty; do if [ "$mode" = missing ]; then header=(); else header=(-H "X-CSRF-Token:"); fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-required" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_E5" "${header[@]}" --data "marker=CSRF_REQUIRED_E5" | jq -c '{accepted,reason}'; done

description.zh: 分别发送缺失和空 X-CSRF-Token 请求，要求两种情况都被拒绝。
description.en: Send missing and empty X-CSRF-Token requests separately and require both cases to be denied.

wafBypass.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/method-override" -H "X-HTTP-Method-Override: PUT" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_F6" --data "marker=CSRF_METHOD_F6" | jq -e '.csrf_checked == true'

description.zh: 通过 X-HTTP-Method-Override 请求 PUT 语义，并断言 CSRF 中间件仍执行。
description.en: Request PUT semantics through X-HTTP-Method-Override and assert that CSRF middleware still runs.

wafBypass.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/parser-consistency" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_G7" --data '{"marker":"CSRF_JSON_G7"}' | jq -e '.csrf_checked == true and .accepted == false'

description.zh: 发送无 Token JSON 请求并断言与 Form 路径执行相同 CSRF 校验。
description.en: Send a tokenless JSON request and assert the same CSRF validation used by the form path.

targetDescription.zh: 对合成 CSRF Token 执行长度与唯一性统计、URL/日志泄露静态检索和固定两次重放，关联 Session 摘要、消费次数和拒绝原因。
targetDescription.en: Audit synthetic CSRF tokens through length and uniqueness statistics, static URL or log leakage searches, and a fixed two-request replay correlated with session digests, consumption counts, and denial reasons.

name.zh: 统计合成 Token 样本

description.zh: 读取 Fixture Token 并输出样本数、唯一数与长度集合，用于发现明显重复或固定长度变化。
description.en: Read fixture tokens and output sample count, unique count, and length set to identify obvious repetition or length changes.

name.zh: 检索 Token URL 与日志泄露
name.en: Search for Token Exposure in URLs and Logs

description.zh: 静态检索源码、Fixture 和配置中 Token 与 URL、Query、Referer 或日志调用的邻近关系。
description.en: Statically search source, fixtures, and configuration for token proximity to URL, query, Referer, or logging calls.

name.zh: 运行固定两次 Token 重放
name.en: Run a Fixed Two-Request Token Replay

commands.command: for attempt in 1 2; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/token-replay" -H "X-Lab-Session: CSRF_SESSION_D4" -H "X-CSRF-Token: CSRF_ONE_TIME_D4" --data "marker=CSRF_REPLAY_D4" | jq -c '{attempt,accepted,reason}' --argjson attempt "$attempt"; done

description.zh: 对同一合成一次性 Token 只发送两次 marker 请求，并比较服务端消费状态和拒绝原因。
description.en: Send exactly two marker requests with one synthetic one-time token and compare server consumption state plus denial reason.
